center.name: 伊卡大区
center.summary: 伊卡大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Pied-crested tit-tyrant，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Peru from Ancash Department south to Ica and western Ayacucho departments

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Peru from Ancash Department south to Ica and western Ayacucho departments
